name: mysql-sample-export
description: MySQL Sample Export - Tauri 2 desktop app for exporting MySQL table structure and sample data

scripts.build: npm run tauri:build && npm run package:windows
scripts.tauri:build:msi: tauri build --bundles msi && npm run package:msi
scripts.tauri:build:all: tauri build --bundles msi,nsis && npm run package:windows
scripts.package:windows: npm run package:msi && npm run package:portable

author: Shawn Lee
